demographics.living_situation: resident in a residential aged care facility; usually mobilises with a walker

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I can't keep a single sip of water down, the room is spinning when I sit up, and I haven't peed all day.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The aged-care nursing staff called because the resident has been vomiting and had watery diarrhoea for a day, can't keep any fluids down, is very dizzy and weak, seems muddled, and hasn't passed urine.

symptom_narrative.character: started with frequent watery diarrhoea and severe nausea, then constant vomiting so nothing stays down; now very weak and muddled
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: she says she has never felt this weak and the room spins whenever she is sat up
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: whole body — sick to the stomach, dizzy in the head, no strength
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, worse when sitting or standing up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — even a sip of water comes straight back up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: sitting or standing up brings on the dizziness; any oral fluid triggers vomiting
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: extreme thirst, dizziness, no urine passed, staff say she seems confused today
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: normally walks with a walker but is now bedbound and too weak and dizzy to stand

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: high blood pressure, on tablets for it

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives in a residential aged care facility; frail; nursing staff present and made the call on her behalf

objective_data_offered.value: nursing staff report no urine passed in the last 12 hours
staff say she seems more confused and muddled than her normal self today
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective staff impression of altered mental state, not a formal cognitive assessment

objective_data_offered.value: staff report her lips and mouth look very dry and she is extremely thirsty
staff report she has been unable to keep down any oral fluids for 24 hours because of constant vomiting
appears frail, pale and weak, lying in bed, dizzy when the staff sit her up
